title: Modules, Packages, and Dependency Boundaries · Runtime Trace: Package Metadata
summary: Split the status coordinator into explicit browser modules and verify clean-environment loading and dependency behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js package metadata increment in a modular status application with a dependency record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret package exports, imports, type, engines, scripts, lockfiles, and semantic versions at install and runtime boundaries.
Distinguish ESM and CommonJS resolution and interop without mixing assumptions across runtimes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
